posts.author: Rasheed22 (Mamoon Rasheed)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I have suggestion to have an option of Save " manually" to pop up or ask to confirm after any changes, or addition to any pages you are working on monday.com. I know there is automatically save now, but some times when you un intentionally bring click on some where it changes some data and it will be saved automatically, later your self be confused who brought this changes. Also, may the people who member in your account my click some where and it cause error and will be automatically saved. I have been using several HRIS, accounting software’s since 15 years, all of them have the manually save option to make sure the data maintain accurate.
